# physicalAI wiki

> Git-versioned, LLM-maintained knowledge base on Physical AI worldwide: history, SOTA, tech tree, key people/orgs, regional landscapes, company deep dives, hardware, data, investment, open problems, safety/regulation, evaluation. 36 topic pages, each adversarially fact-checked (`confidence: verified`), last updated 2026-07-05. Maintained by an autonomous research loop (LOOP.md); every change is a git commit.

## Start here
- [HOME](wiki/HOME.md): annotated index, field overview, reading order

## Core
- [History of Physical AI](wiki/history.md): Unimate/Shakey → deep-RL/sim2real → the 2022-26 robot-foundation-model turn and humanoid mass-production wave
- [State of the Art (2026-07)](wiki/state-of-the-art.md): hub snapshot — leading VLAs, first commercial humanoid fleets, shipment shares, record capital
- [Physical AI Tech Tree](wiki/tech-tree.md): layered dependency map with per-branch bottlenecks (data, dexterity, reliability)
- [Visions & Theses](wiki/visions.md): leaders' framings with dated primary quotes (Huang, Musk, Hassabis, Li, LeCun, Son, Wang) + skeptics; convergence/divergence matrix

## Technology
- [Vision-Language-Action Models](wiki/vla-models.md): RT-1/RT-2 → π0.x, GR00T, Gemini Robotics, Helix — architectures, data, benchmarks, open-vs-closed
- [World Models for Robotics](wiki/world-models.md): Cosmos, Genie 3, 1X, V-JEPA 2, Tesla — learned simulators, planners, evaluators, data engines
- [Dexterous Manipulation](wiki/manipulation.md): grippers vs hands, tactile sensing, ALOHA/Diffusion-Policy/UMI lineage, capability frontier
- [Legged Locomotion](wiki/locomotion.md): ZMP/MPC → massively-parallel sim-to-real RL, parkour milestones, field robustness
- [Simulation & Sim2Real](wiki/simulation.md): GPU-parallel sims, domain randomization, synthetic-data pipelines
- [Hardware Substrate](wiki/hardware.md): actuators, hands, sensing, compute, batteries, BOM curves, supply chain
- [The Robot Data Problem](wiki/data.md): teleop, human video, sim data, open datasets, data factories, scaling-law evidence
- [Tactile Sensing & Dexterous Hands](wiki/tactile-hands.md): hand landscape with prices, tactile sensing tech, datasets, China hand economics, the dexterity gap
- [Data Foundry Economics](wiki/data-foundry.md): Scale post-Meta, Generalist wearables foundry, China state-subsidized data factories, teleop $/hour economics
- [Evaluation & Benchmarks](wiki/evaluation.md): sim-suite saturation, real-robot arenas, embodied-reasoning exams, industry metrics, benchmark credibility

## People & organizations
- [Key People](wiki/key-people.md): researchers, founder-executives, China founders; 2024-26 moves
- [Organizations: Global Who's-Who](wiki/organizations.md): companies, big-tech divisions, labs, national programs
- [Academic Lab Map](wiki/academic-labs.md): global labs, PIs, signature datasets/benchmarks, lab→startup pipelines

## Regional landscapes
- [Landscape: USA & Canada](wiki/landscape-usa.md): humanoid makers, robot-brain labs, NVIDIA platform, big tech, funding climate
- [Landscape: China](wiki/landscape-china.md): ~90% of humanoid volume, supply chain, policy, price disruption, IPO wave
- [Landscape: Europe, Japan, Korea & RoW](wiki/landscape-row.md): 1X/NEURA/PAL, Japan's incumbents + sovereign JV, Korea's chaebols, Israel/India/Gulf

## Capital & frontier
- [Investment & Market](wiki/investment.md): as-of-dated mega-round/valuation/IPO ledger with bubble-watch skepticism
- [Open Problems & Debates](wiki/open-problems.md): data scarcity, sim2real, dexterity gap, reliability, safety certification, evaluation crisis, form-factor and timeline debates
- [Safety & Regulation](wiki/safety-regulation.md): ISO 25785-1 / 10218:2025 / UL 3300, EU Machinery Regulation + AI Act, China HEIS, certification gates, incidents, liability

## Company deep dives
- [Figure AI](wiki/company-figure.md): founding, funding arc to $39B, Helix, BotQ, BMW engagement, OpenAI split, skeptic case
- [Unitree](wiki/company-unitree.md): XDog-to-IPO arc, price ladder, prospectus financials, STAR IPO, viral milestones, US scrutiny
- [Physical Intelligence](wiki/company-pi.md): founding team, ~$1.07B raised, π0→π0.7 arc, openpi ecosystem, pre-revenue posture
- [NVIDIA Robotics Stack](wiki/company-nvidia.md): three-computer thesis, Isaac/GR00T/Cosmos/Jetson/Halos, ~1%-of-revenue reality vs $40T TAM
- [Tesla Optimus](wiki/company-optimus.md): generation timeline, claims-vs-delivery ledger, Fremont status, AI5 silicon, supply chain
- [Boston Dynamics](wiki/company-bostondynamics.md): 100% Hyundai-owned, production Atlas, partner-built brain, Spot/Stretch economics
- [Agility Robotics](wiki/company-agility.md): warehouse-first thesis, $2.5B SPAC w/ Foxconn PIPE, deployment record, RaaS economics
- [1X Technologies](wiki/company-1x.md): home-first bet, tendon-driven NEO, teleop flywheel, delivery-risk falsifiers
- [Skild AI](wiki/company-skild.md): omni-bodied brain at >$14B, revenue-first posture, In-Q-Tel/defense angle
- [AgiBot](wiki/company-agibot.md): China volume leader, open data ecosystem, ODM/EMS manufacturing path, HK IPO
- [UBTech](wiki/company-ubtech.md): first listed humanoid maker, Walker industrial ramp, U1 consumer launch, financial reality

## Reference
- [Glossary](wiki/glossary.md): ~35 core Physical AI terms, each cross-linked to its covering page

## 中文版 (Chinese mirror)
- [wiki-zh/](wiki-zh/): full Simplified-Chinese translation of all pages, same slugs, `lang: zh` frontmatter, synced from wiki/ (built 2026-07-04)

## Meta
- [LOOP.md](LOOP.md): loop engineering — how the wiki maintains itself
- [Loop log](wiki/_meta/loop-log.md): append-only iteration history
- [Research queue](wiki/_meta/queue.md): backlog for future iterations
